note: Committed baseline for the deterministic --gate cost regression check. Computed once from the 20 scenarios in scenarios.jsonl using the fake-node runner in scripts/eval.py. This is NOT a measured production cost — the field name says so. Regenerate with `uv run python -m expense_agent_svc.scripts.eval --gate --report evals/last_run_new.json` and manually replace this file (never overwritten by a failing gate).
